articles.summary:
Australia joins the UK, Italy, France, Germany, Canada, Norway, the Netherlands and New Zealand in condemning illegal settlements

articles.title: Peec, one of Berlin’s rising startups, more than doubled annualized revenue in months to $10M, sources say
articles.summary: Peec, which helps brands track their presence in AI searches, offers proof of a key trend among European startups.

articles.title: SpaceX launches Starship V3 for the first time, but loses booster on return
articles.summary: The company had a mostly successful first launch of its upgraded Starship V3, which it needs to power its many ambitious goals in the years to come.

articles.title: What Mattress Firm gained from contactless delivery
articles.summary: The shipping option has added customer flexibility and freed up drivers’ time despite early hurdles, executives said at Home Delivery World 2026.

articles.title: Albertsons launches AI-powered produce inspection tool
OpenAI named a Leader in enterprise coding agents by Gartner
articles.summary: OpenAI is named a leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex recognized for innovation and enterprise-scale deployment.

articles.title: 山西绛县一石灰窑发生工人一氧化碳中毒事件，造成1人死亡2人重伤
articles.summary: 记者从山西省运城市绛县相关部门了解到，5月23日上午，该县一石灰窑发生一起工人一氧化碳中毒事件，造成1人死亡、2人重伤、3人轻伤。（新华社）

articles.title: 美国夏威夷州发生6.0级地震，震源深度20千米
articles.summary: 中国地震台网正式测定：05月23日15时46分在美国夏威夷州（北纬19.40度，西经155.80度）发生6.0级地震，震源深度20千米。

articles.title: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
articles.summary: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.
